recommendations.title: Increase budget for Bing Ads (30d)
recommendations.description: High ROAS (6.27x) with low daily spend (44 $/day). Underinvested channel.
recommendations.expected_impact: Revenue uplift: ~5.3x per dollar of incremental spend.
recommendations.effort: Low (increase daily budget in ad platform)
recommendations.action: Increase daily budget by 25–50% and monitor ROAS over next 14 days.

recommendations.title: Optimize or reduce spend for Google Ads (90d)
recommendations.description: Low ROAS (1.47x) with significant daily spend (2194 $/day). Diminishing returns.
recommendations.expected_impact: Cost savings of 20–40% with minimal revenue loss if spend is reallocated.
recommendations.effort: Medium (audience/targeting review + A/B test)
recommendations.action: Review audience targeting, pause underperforming ad groups, test new creatives. Consider 20% budget reduction.

recommendations.title: Optimize Search campaign spend level
recommendations.description: Search has highest ROAS (10.33x) but response curve shows steep diminishing returns. Find the sweet spot.
recommendations.expected_impact: Maximize incremental revenue without pushing into diminishing returns.
recommendations.effort: Medium (run A/B budget tests at 0.8x, 1.0x, 1.2x multipliers)
recommendations.action: Test budget multipliers between 0.8x and 1.2x over 2-week windows. Measure marginal ROAS at each level.
